description: Philly (Lancer) + Hector (Infantry) combo — both Tier 1 heroes, both have chance skills, run 5-10 game replicates. Tests Lancer+Infantry skill stacking for a high-impact T1 pairing not yet validated. minxxx defends with Philly (S1=2/S2=2/S3=1) + Hector (S1=3/S2=4/S3=4). First validation of Philly+Hector interaction.
